items.title: Proptech CRM Lofty sues a serial CIPA litigant and rolls out a legal defense program for agents
items.note: 91,000+ real estate pros covered as boilerplate analytics-tool demand letters spread across California

items.title: Agent-payments startup Natural raises $30M to take on Stripe
items.note: Forerunner-led Series A brings total funding to $40M for a layer that lets AI agents move and store money

items.title: Databricks signs a term sheet for new funding at a $188B valuation
items.note: Coatue-led round, up from $134B in February, will fund AI governance tools and its agent-facing Lakebase database

items.title: Anthropic, Blackstone and Hellman & Friedman launch Ode, a $1.5B enterprise AI services firm
items.note: Claude-first forward-deployed engineers built on the Fractional AI acquisition, backed by Goldman Sachs and Sequoia

items.title: US foreclosures jump 21% in the first half of 2026 as timelines shorten
items.note: ATTOM: active inventory hits a six-year high, Florida, South Carolina and Indiana lead the rise

items.title: Cisco in advanced talks to buy Israeli cyber startup Zafran at a steep discount
items.note: Reported $150-200M offer well below its $200M+ December valuation, after a co-founder's departure to Nvidia

items.title: Ex-SentinelOne and Wiz executives launch Neo Security with $100M to guard AI agents
items.note: $75M Series A led by a16z and Bessemer stacks on a previously undisclosed $25M seed

items.title: CrowdStrike buys XM Cyber's IP, five years after the Israeli startup's $700M sale
items.note: 45+ patents and source code acquired from Schwarz Digits; XM Cyber keeps operating standalone
